PASS_TO_PASS: mkdir -p /tmp/nobody /tmp/gradle-nobody && cp -a /root/.gradle/. /tmp/gradle-nobody/ 2>/dev/null || true; chown -R nobody:nogroup /tmp/nobody /tmp/gradle-nobody /workspace/eval_repo && runuser -u nobody -- bash -lc 'cd /workspace/eval_repo && export HOME=/tmp/nobody GRADLE_USER_HOME=/tmp/gradle-nobody LANG=C.UTF-8 LC_ALL=C.UTF-8 JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS=-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 JAVA12_HOME=/opt/jdk-12 JAVA11_HOME=/opt/jdk-11 RUNTIME_JAVA_HOME=/opt/jdk-11; . /etc/profile >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; JAVA_HOME=$(elastic-select-java "$PWD") && export JAVA_HOME PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" && ./gradlew --no-daemon --console=plain -Dcompiler.java=12 -Druntime.java=11 :qa:no-bootstrap-tests:test --tests org.elasticsearch.bootstrap.SpawnerNoBootstrapTests.testControllerSpawn'
